description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU CI that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and manually. The workflow has three jobs: build_and_test_amd, test_amd_gpu, and build_and_test_cpu. The build_and_test_amd job runs on a linux.12xlarge instance with a container, using a matrix strategy to test different Python and ROCm versions. The test_amd_gpu job is currently disabled. The build_and_test_cpu job runs on a linux.12xlarge instance with a container, using a matrix strategy to test different Python versions on CPU.
